# The testscript harness must shadow external CLIs with fakes.
exec git
stdout '^fake git$'
exec tmux
stdout '^fake tmux$'
exec ssh
stdout '^fake ssh$'
exec slicer
stdout '^fake slicer$'
exec sbx
stdout '^fake sbx$'
exec pi
stdout '^fake pi$'
exec claude
stdout '^fake claude$'
exec codex
stdout '^fake codex$'
